subcodes.first_line: We have sent down the Bayan and therein gave glad tidings unto all who dwell within the realm of contingent being of this Manifestation, through Whose command all things were set in motion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا البیان و بشرنا فیه من فی الامکان بهذا الظهور الذی بامره تحرکت
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
